info.name: Clan of the Commander
info.description: The Commander subclass for the Crusader.
info.author: Guzufu

description.p: Project your will onto your blade with powerful psionic magic

In order to best protect the weak and force evil to bend the knee, some Crusaders have chosen to empower themselves through mastering psionics. As such, these Crusaders are able to push their physical gifts and sharpen them with mental quickness to use these new abilities to quash evil wherever it may root itself

You are a master at best utilising your weapon. You are able to choose a second weapon mastery from the list of Mastery Properties to apply to weapons which you have Weapon Mastery. For example, if you have chosen to take on the weapon mastery of the Halberd (Cleave) and Handaxe (Vex), you can choose to add Topple to your Halberd and Cleave to your Handaxe.

sheet.description: You are able to choose a second weapon mastery from the list of Mastery Properties to apply to weapons which you have Weapon Mastery.

description.p: You are sturdy and unmoving against your foes. You have advantage on saving throws against being grappled, restrained or paralyzed. In addition, you are immune to effects that slow your movement such as difficult terrain and the Slow weapon mastery. Effects that reduce your speed to 0 such as Incapacitated still apply.

sheet.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being grappled, restrained or paralyzed. In addition, you are immune to effects that slow your movement such as difficult terrain and the Slow weapon mastery. Effects that reduce your speed to 0 such as Incapacitated still apply.

description.p: When you use your Relentless feature, you can choose to grant yourself temporary hit points equal to half of damage you reduced with your Relentless feature.

sheet.description: When you use your Relentless feature, you can choose to grant yourself temporary hit points equal to half of damage you reduced with your Relentless feature.

description.p: When a creature strikes you with an attack, you find a strength within to respond in kind. If you hit a creature that had dealt damage to you since the end of your last turn, you deal an additional 1d8 damage with your weapon.

sheet.description: If you hit a creature that had dealt damage to you since the end of your last turn, you deal an additional 1d8 damage with your weapon.
